# Universal Packaging Group (UPG)
## Machine-readable summary for AI crawlers

> Premium custom packaging for beauty and product brands.

---

## About

Universal Packaging Group (UPG) is a quote-led custom packaging company serving brands in the United States and Canada. UPG handles quote management, packaging guidance, supplier coordination, production follow-through, and delivery planning across five day-one product formats.

Website: https://universalpackaginggroup.com
Contact: quotes@universalpackaginggroup.com

---

## Positioning

- Cosmetics-first buying journey
- All day-one product formats visible from launch
- North America-facing quote-led packaging partner
- Built for outreach, not instant checkout

---

## Products

1. **Corrugated Mailer Box** (slug: custom-mailer-boxes)
   - Family: Boxes
   - MOQ: 250+ units
   - Lead time: 12–16 business days
   - Use cases: e-commerce shipping, subscription boxes, beauty launches, PR kits

2. **Magnetic Closure Rigid Box** (slug: custom-rigid-boxes)
   - Family: Boxes
   - MOQ: 300+ units
   - Lead time: 18–25 business days
   - Use cases: luxury cosmetics, perfume, gift packaging, PR kits

3. **Stand Up Mylar Pouch** (slug: custom-mylar-bags)
   - Family: Mylar Bags
   - MOQ: 1,000+ units
   - Lead time: 20–28 business days
   - Use cases: supplements, coffee, dry goods, personal care refills

4. **Reverse Tuck End Folding Carton** (slug: custom-folding-cartons)
   - Family: Boxes
   - MOQ: 500+ units
   - Lead time: 12–18 business days
   - Use cases: skincare, serums, lipstick, retail packaging

5. **Single Wall Paper Cup** (slug: custom-coffee-cups)
   - Family: Paper Cups
   - MOQ: 1,000+ units
   - Lead time: 15–22 business days
   - Use cases: cafes, events, beverage sampling, takeaway

---

## Industries Served

- Cosmetics & Beauty
- E-commerce & Retail
- Supplements & Specialty Food
- Coffee & Beverage

---

## Cosmetics Hub

Primary cosmetics route families:
- /cosmetics
- /cosmetics/skincare-boxes
- /cosmetics/serum-boxes
- /cosmetics/cream-boxes
- /cosmetics/lotion-boxes
- /cosmetics/lipstick-boxes
- /cosmetics/lip-gloss-boxes
- /cosmetics/mascara-boxes
- /cosmetics/perfume-boxes
- /cosmetics/cosmetic-subscription-boxes
- /cosmetics/pr-boxes

---

## Quote Process

1. Submit request at /get-a-quote — include product type, quantity, dimensions, materials, and shipping destination
2. UPG reviews specs and sends detailed pricing within 24 business hours
3. Approve artwork, confirm proofs, UPG manages production through to landed delivery

---

## Key Facts

- Quote turnaround: 24 business hours (standard target)
- Minimum order quantity: depends on product format and structure
- Delivery markets: United States and Canada (DDP pricing available)
- Design support: included — artwork guidance, dielines, print setup
- Pricing model: quote-led (no instant online pricing — custom specs require individual review)

---

## Site Structure

- / — Homepage
- /products — Full day-one product directory
- /cosmetics — Cosmetics packaging hub
- /materials-finishes — Materials, finishes, and capability page
- /samples — Sample and portfolio direction page
- /get-a-quote — Quote request form
- /about — Company overview
- /faq — Frequently asked questions
- /contact — Contact information
- /products/[slug] — Individual product pages (5 products)
- /cosmetics/[slug] — Cosmetic subcategory pages
